The '''toccat''' was a species native to the jungle [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Darlyn Boda/Legends|Darlyn Boda]]. The creatures had four hooves, long pink snouts, and black-furred bodies.

[[Haruspex]]es—[[Fortune teller/Legends|fortune tellers]] on Darlyn Boda—made a living divining the future from the entrails of slain toccats.
